title: Development Confirmed
description: Rockstar Games officially confirms that the next entry in the Grand Theft Auto series is well underway.

title: Trailer 1 Reveal
description: The first official trailer drops, revealing Vice City, the state of Leonida and dual protagonists Lucia & Jason.

title: Trailer 2
description: A second trailer expands on the world, characters and tone — fueling speculation across the community.

title: Gameplay Reveal
description: Rockstar pulls back the curtain on extended gameplay, mechanics and the systems powering Vice City.

title: Pre-Orders Open
description: Pre-orders go live at midnight local time on the PlayStation Store (PS5), Xbox, Rockstar Games Store and retailers. Early buyers get the Vintage Vice City Pack.

title: Digital Pre-Load
description: Players who pre-order digital editions can begin pre-loading the game one week before launch, ready to play the moment it unlocks.

title: Launch Day
description: Grand Theft Auto VI releases on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. The wait is finally over.

title: Online & Future DLC
description: Online multiplayer and ongoing content updates arrive after launch, extending life in Vice City for years.
